query:
-- إحصائيات شاملة للنظام
SELECT 'Groups' as entity, COUNT(*) as count FROM groups
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Workers', COUNT(*) FROM workers
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Attendance Events', COUNT(*) FROM attendance_events
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Payroll Batches', COUNT(*) FROM payroll_batches
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Payroll Batch Items', COUNT(*) FROM payroll_batch_items;
